bolt.guidance: Review the newly added Btrfs filesystem check in `neos-autoupdate.sh`. Ensure that standard POSIX utilities like `findmnt` are utilized efficiently and don't introduce performance regressions or extra execution overhead before the update runs.

palette.guidance: Review the error message logic related to the Btrfs check in `neos-autoupdate.sh`. Ensure that any warnings or notifications triggered are clearly understood by the end user, with unambiguous explanations of what it means when an update fails or skips snapshots.

sentinel.guidance: Verify the integrity of the new sandboxing rules in `airootfs/etc/systemd/system/neos-driver-manager.service`. Ensure that `ProtectSystem=full`, `ProtectHome=yes`, `PrivateTmp=yes`, and `NoNewPrivileges=yes` correctly limit root privileges without compromising the service's legitimate need to scan PCI devices.
